judgment.summary: Profitable company with strong margins and returns, but facing declining growth and a recent founder dispute.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 4.8%; next earnings date is 2026-06-04.
positives: Return on equity 34.0% — excellent capital efficiency.
Free cash flow $824.08M — healthy cash generation.
Trailing P/E 8.99x — appears inexpensive relative to historical multiples and peers.
negatives: Earnings growth -18.5% YoY — profitability is contracting.
Quarterly earnings growth -21.6% — recent performance is weak.
Analyst growth est, current FY: -7.2% — further declines expected.
Founder dispute could signal governance or strategic issues.

news.paragraph: Lululemon's recent headlines highlight internal discord with its founder and a broader industry trend towards AI compute costs, neither of which directly address the company's core apparel business. The upcoming earnings report on June 4th will be critical for assessing the company's performance and outlook amidst these external narratives. Traders should monitor management's commentary for any signs of strategic shifts or impacts on consumer demand.

headlines.title: This Cannes Film Cost $500,000 to Make. $400,000 Was AI Compute Costs.
Emails Show How Lululemon’s Peace Treaty With Its Founder Fell Apart
